creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Compiling/updating/reinstalling port net-im/pidgin on FreeBSD 10 fails with the following error.
I doesn't matter for me what compiler I use, it fails at the same place with CLANG, legacy gcc 2.4.1 and both gcc 4.6/4.7.

I tried to delete everything belonging to pidgin, even port net-im/libpurple, but the error persists. net-im/libpurple has been compiled successfully with CLANG.


[...]

  CC     gtkwhiteboard.o
  CC     minidialog.o
  CC     pidgintooltip.o
  CCLD   pidgin
gtkmedia.o: In function `pidgin_medias_init':
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1178: undefined reference to `purple_media_element_info_get_type'
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1186: undefined reference to `purple_media_element_info_get_type'
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1195: undefined reference to `purple_media_element_info_get_type'
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1203: undefined reference to `purple_media_element_info_get_type'
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1216: undefined reference to `purple_media_manager_set_active_element'
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1217: undefined reference to `purple_media_manager_set_active_element'
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1218: undefined reference to `purple_media_manager_set_active_element'
gtkmedia.o: In function `pidgin_media_disconnect_levels':
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:466: undefined reference to `purple_media_manager_get_pipeline'
gtkmedia.o: In function `pidgin_medias_init':
/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin/gtkmedia.c:1219: undefined reference to `purple_media_manager_set_active_element'
gmake[1]: *** [pidgin] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin/work/pidgin-2.10.4/pidgin'
gmake: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-im/pidgin.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-im/pidgin.
*** [reinstall] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-im/pidgin.
